REPORT RELAYED BY SPOTTER. EVENT TIME AND LOCATION APPROXIMATE. NV HIGHWAY 359 SOUTH OF HAWTHORNE AND LUCKY BOY PASS ROAD BOTH CLOSED TO TRAFFIC. AT LEAST ONE VEHICLE STRANDED IN MUD.
EAST FORK FIRE REPORTED FLASH FLOODING IN THE TOPAZ RANCH ESTATES AREA YESTERDAY. MINOR LANDSCAPE DAMAGE AND LIGHT DEBRIS FLOW WAS NOTED IN REPORT AND PHOTOS.
CHP REPORTING WATER IS COVERING LUNDY LAKE ROAD. EMERGENCY CREWS ARE UNABLE TO REACH AN EMERGENCY CALL.

PUBLIC REPORTED QUARTER SIZED HAIL NEAR THE CARSON CITY HIGH SCHOOL.
TRAINED WEATHER SPOTTER REPORTED 61 MPH WIND GUST ALONG WITH VERY HEAVY RAINFALL. SPOTTER REPORTED NO FLOODING AT THIS TIME.

FLOODING IN THE SUNRIDGE COURT SUBDIVISION WITH 3 INCHES OF WATER ACROSS THE ROAD AND WATER COVERING THE SIDEWALKS.

2-4 FEET OF MUD ACROSS THE ROAD AT CENTER DRIVE AND RABE WAY. THE MUD SPANS FOR ONE HALF TO THREE QUARTERS OF A MILE.

TRAINED WEATHER SPOTTER REPORTED FLASH FLOODING. WIND MILL ROAD IS WASHED OUT AND CALLE DE CENO IS IMPASSABLE. SPOTTER ESTIMATED 1.20 INCHES OF RAINFALL IN 30-40 MINUTES.

PERSHING COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE HAS CONFIRMED A LARGE AND VERY DANGEROUS DUST STORM IS OCCURING.
LOTS OF MUD ACROSS ROADS BEING SHOVELED OUT BY COMMUNITY AT THE GOLF COURSE. SOME HOUSES HAD LOTS OF DAMAGE FROM THE MUD SLIDES AND WATER.
TRAINED WEATHER SPOTTER REPORTED 0.51 INCHES OF RAINFALL IN 45 MINUTES. SPOTTER ALSO REPORTED ROADWAY FLOODING AND FREQUENT LIGHTNING.
THUNDERSTORM WIND GUST OF 68 MPH REPORTED AT BULL FLAT RAWS IN EASTERN LASSEN COUNTY CALIFORNIA. 10 MINUTE SUSTAINED WIND OF 46 MPH.

FIRE DEPARTMENT REPORTED MUD ACROSS US HWY 50 NEAR CAVE ROCK AND MUD FLOW OVER KINGSBURY GRADE. THEY ALSO REPORTED NUMEROUS HYPOTHERMIA CASES FROM PEOPLE IN CONVERTABLES AND JEEPS, MOTORCYCLE RIDERS AND BOATERS ON LAKE TAHOE.
